title: Update footer with smaller font size and black text color

requirements.text: Reduce the font size of the footer text 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' to make it more subtle and less prominent

quotes: i want to replace font of footer with small size

acceptanceCriteria: Footer text font size is reduced from current size
Text remains readable but more subtle
Font size change is applied to the Footer component

requirements.text: Change the footer text color to black (#000000 or equivalent) instead of the current gradient styling

quotes: the black colour is for new footer

acceptanceCriteria: Footer text displays in solid black color
Text color is applied consistently across light and dark themes

requirements.text: Maintain the modern clean font family (Inter, Poppins, or Montserrat) currently applied to the footer text

quotes: Keep the modern clean font (Inter/Poppins/Montserrat) that's currently applied

acceptanceCriteria: Footer continues using the modern clean font family
No change to font family, only size and color are modified

constraints: Do not modify the footer text content 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits'
Keep the existing footer component structure in frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx
nonGoals: Adding new footer content or links
Changing fonts in other parts of the application
